crime.value: Silent alarm triggered at mansion, blackout of security cameras, crime scene with multiple bodies requiring forensic investigation
crime.quote: silent alarm triggered at one of the multimillion dollar mansions... camera feed to their monitoring facilities were blacked out

victim.value: Multiple unidentified bodies found at property leased by Casius Arcano
victim.quote: They also needed to find out who the hell those bodies were.

closed_world.value: Ultra-posh Oakridge Estates with multiple security gates, isolated ridge location, limited access points
closed_world.quote: ultra-posh Oakridge Estates... miles of back canyon and up the ridge that separated the community from basically everything

resolution.value: Forensic analysis of jet fuel residue and full spectrum photographs to prove stealth helicopter theory
resolution.quote: forensics was going to find jet fuel residue on the plants... full spectrum photographs were going to pull a signature

investigator.value: Detective Vinny and newcomer Detective Dillon Cole, with Dillon having military/specialized aircraft background
investigator.quote: I personally have flown such aircraft... meet me over at Lost Hills and you can start making your calls

red_herring.value: Paparazzi or raccoon alarm triggers suggested as likely causes while stealth helicopter theory emerges as true possibility
red_herring.quote: It was not uncommon, however, for an alarm to be triggered by a raccoon wandering in through a doggie door

clue_fairness.value: Camera feeds blacked out, dirt tracking by previous detectives, potential jet fuel residue on plants described to reader
clue_fairness.quote: the alarm company had relayed to dispatch that the camera feed to their monitoring facilities were blacked out

social_world.value: Ultra-posh Oakridge Estates with multimillion dollar mansions, high-profile residents, private security teams, and paparazzi concerns
social_world.quote: ultra-posh Oakridge Estates where they were responding to what is known as a code 2115

reveal_mechanic.value: Forensics will find jet fuel residue on plants and full spectrum photographs will show helicopter landing signature
reveal_mechanic.quote: forensics was going to find jet fuel residue on the plants out back and those full spectrum photographs

investigator_wound.value: Dillon knows his stealth helicopter theory sounds far-fetched and risks being dismissed as candidate number eight
investigator_wound.quote: he knew it was going to be goodbye candidate number eight

_meta.title: ebook mell corcoran shadows of deceit
